purpose: Custom ABAP programs documented for analyst reference.

Append-only audit of term archival events.
Business term registry. Created/edited via Business_Glossary page; Stage A blocker loader appends. Status: draft/approved/archived.
Per-term Stage C->E bridge with declared_sufficient + validated S2T fragment. Written by scripts/_bar_writer.py.
Source-system contracts (expected schemas, SLAs). Hand-maintained.

DV 2.0 entity catalog (which hub/link/sat exists, why).
One row per (model, column): source expression, transformation, origin. Powers column-level lineage. Written by scripts/scan_dbt_models.py.
One row per dbt model: name, layer, materialization, refs, columns. Written by scripts/scan_dbt_models.py.
Inferred fact<->dim joinability from shared vault ancestors. Written by scripts/extract_dbt_relationships.py.
Layer B semantic model: deterministic extraction from dbt/target/manifest.json. Per-dbt-model canonical info. Written by scripts/compile_dbt_semantic_model.py.
One row per Domain Analysis Result. Written by scripts/run_*_analysis.py (10+ analyzers). Atom of Stage B analysis.
Per-domain summarized facts used to ground Stage B prompts. Written by scripts/refresh_domain_facts.py.
Per-domain markdown report. Written by app/pages/Data_Analysis.py.
GL account dictionary for the FI shadow postings (account name, type, margin flow category). Written by generate_fi_shadows.py; read by the contribution-margin models.
Append-only ingestion event log. Drives the staleness-banner UI.
Append-only architectural decision log. Every model change must add a row (CLAUDE.md commit-gate rule).
Open / resolved / wontfix issue tracker. NEXT_SESSION-tagged items are the routing surface.
HT corporate structure (purchasing orgs, plants, cost centers). Hierarchical; cleanest production home is a new hub_org_unit (deferred follow-up to the seed->vault refactor).
Business rules (DQ thresholds, approval limits). Cross-cutting policy, not entity attributes — stays as a seed.
Source-to-target column mappings. Auto-generated by scripts/sync_s2t_from_dbt.py; Stage E appends on deploy.
Per (table, column) classification. Written by scripts/classify_source_columns.py (LLM batch) + scripts/run_catalog_backfill.py.
Per-table SAP metadata (purpose, category). Written by scripts/scrape_sap_catalog.py (one-shot scrape from public docs).
Layer A semantic model: LLM-synthesized canonical conventions for raw SAP tables WITHOUT dbt ontology coverage. Written by scripts/compile_semantic_model.py.
Append-only diff every time source_column_roles is re-classified.
LLM-assigned column roles (key/measure/dimension/metadata).
Per-iteration query+result for Stage C term EDA. Written by scripts/_tar_writer.py.
Custom Z-tables documented (Z*-prefixed).

Z-table reference: REASON_CODE dictionary.

Category + purpose for every seed in dbt/seeds/ - the taxonomy the Seeds Catalog page renders. Governed as a seed so it cannot drift from the seeds it describes (pinned by test_seed_taxonomy_invariant).
